title: エンディング（ノーマル）

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My first three raucous years with Inari One are
coming to a close...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, her path as a racer stretches forward
still.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I know she has another festival in store, one that
will move the hearts of many people.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Inari One has brought both Oguri Cap and
Super Creek to Oi Racecourse—where her journey
began.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
That was a wonderful race. ♪ I was on the edge of
my seat the entire time!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Right? They totally went all out!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It reminded me of being back in Kasamatsu.
Makes me want to run on dirt too.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh, say no more! How about havin' a race when
we get back?

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text: Oh, Inari! You came to see us—wait, huh?!

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text:
Y-you brought Oguri Cap and Super Creek?! The
Eternal Top Three are all here!

text_block_list.name: Onlookers
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Argh! What're ya doin', sayin' that out loud!

text_block_list.name: Townswoman
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Inari! Are these your friends from the
academy? Make sure you all come by my shop
later!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... That smell... You must run a soba
restaurant.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, and it's one of my favorite spots. The
shrimp tempura she makes is to die for!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh then we definitely should have a bite. ♪ I'm
just about hungry myself.

text_block_list.name: Townsman
text_block_list.text:
Inari! Come 'round my shop for round two! It's on
the house!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, sounds perfect! You're lookin' at the
hungriest racer in Tracen, right here!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
We should eat at all the restaurants down this
street.

text_block_list.name: Townsman
text_block_list.text:
I-is she being serious? Better call in the cavalry
then! We got a hungry beast on the loose!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Inari, thank you for inviting me out today. I had a
lot of fun. The food was delicious too.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, glad to hear it. Everyone was sayin' you
two should come back 'round, so let's do this
again some time, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah. I'd love that.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
By the way... would you like to come with me to
Kasamatsu? I want to introduce you to my people
too.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: You betcha! I'd love to see your hometown!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: All right, we'll definitely go sometime.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Inari. I can't thank you enough for today. ♪ I had
so much fun.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...After accompanying you, I realized something.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: What's that?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's evident now that your hometown is the source
of your kindness and strength. ♪

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
'Course it is! This workin' class town is where I got
all my style and class!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After parting ways with Oguri Cap and Super
Creek, we head back to my office...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, Boss. I was thinkin' 'bout what Creek said.
choice_data_list:
About how your hometown's the source of your
power?

About how your hometown's the source of your
power?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, Boss. I was thinkin' 'bout what Creek said.
choice_data_list:
About how your hometown's the source of your
power?

About how your hometown's the source of your
power?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
...She's not wrong. But there's somethin' missin' to
her answer.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
It's true that the folks back home are the source
of my strength.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: But just as much as they are...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: So are you, Boss.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: So are you, Boss.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Now and forever... That will never change.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: So...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I'll still be countin' on ya, partner.
